b:if.title: Claude Bridge — Control Claude Code From Anywhere
| Claude Bridge

meta.name: description
meta.content: Claude Bridge — open-source Telegram to Claude Code CLI bridge. Control Claude Code from anywhere via your phone. Zero extra API cost.

meta.name: description
meta.content: Claude Bridge — Telegram to Claude Code CLI bridge. Changelog and technical articles.
Claude Bridge — Control Claude Code From Anywhere
Open-source Telegram to Claude Code CLI bridge. Zero extra API cost, multi-project management, session persistence.

meta.name: twitter:title
meta.content: Claude Bridge — Control Claude Code From Anywhere

meta.name: twitter:description
meta.content: Open-source Telegram to Claude Code CLI bridge. Zero extra API cost.

head.script: { "@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "WebSite", "name": "Claude Bridge", "url": "https://claudebridge.blogspot.com", "description": "Open-source Telegram to Claude Code CLI bridge — control Claude Code from anywhere via your phone", "inLanguage": ["en", "zh"] }

section.p: A lightweight bridge connecting Telegram to Claude Code CLI. Run code, manage projects, and deploy — all from your phone.

div.div: Reuses your Claude Max subscription ($100/mo). No separate API billing. The bridge itself is just I/O — all intelligence comes from claude -p.
Switch between projects with /p. Each project has its own CLAUDE.md, session state, and cost tracking. InlineKeyboard UI for quick access.
Full Claude Code capabilities via Telegram — read files, edit code, run shell commands, search the web. Images and multi-turn sessions supported.

body.footer: claudebridge.blogspot.com · A Dharmaxis Group Project · Built with Claude Max
